---
title: "Projects"
description: "Project showcase for Jiho Min: study tools, productivity experiments, AI workflows, and browser customization."
---

::: {.site-shell .page-shell}
::: {.page-hero}
::: {.eyebrow}
Project showcase
:::

# Practical tools, learning apps, and experiments.

I like projects that solve clear problems: studying more effectively, organizing information, improving workflows, or testing a useful idea quickly.
:::

::: {.cards-grid}
::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-topline}
<span>Education</span><span>In progress</span>
:::

### Social Study App

A quiz-based study web app for middle school social studies.

**Problem it solves:** Helps students practice key concepts through short, repeatable quizzes instead of passive rereading.

**Tech stack:** React, TypeScript, CSS, local-first data

::: {.card-actions}
[Live Demo](#){.project-link}
[GitHub](#){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-topline}
<span>Study space</span><span>Prototype</span>
:::

### Reading Room Seat Tracker

A tool for checking and organizing reading room seat availability.

**Problem it solves:** Makes it easier to see available seats and plan study time without unnecessary back-and-forth.

**Tech stack:** HTML, CSS, JavaScript, structured JSON data

::: {.card-actions}
[Live Demo](#){.project-link}
[GitHub](#){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-topline}
<span>AI workflow</span><span>Experiments</span>
:::

### AI Study Tools

Experiments using AI to improve studying, memorization, and productivity.

**Problem it solves:** Converts notes into prompts, summaries, quizzes, and review plans while keeping human checking in the loop.

**Tech stack:** Prompt design, AI assistants, web prototypes, Markdown

::: {.card-actions}
[Live Demo](#){.project-link}
[GitHub](#){.project-link}
:::
:::

::: {.project-card}
::: {.card-topline}
<span>Workflow</span><span>Ongoing</span>
:::

### Browser Customization Experiments

Custom workflows, UI tweaks, and productivity setups for browsers.

**Problem it solves:** Reduces friction in daily web tasks by improving shortcuts, layouts, and information access.

**Tech stack:** Browser settings, userscripts, CSS tweaks, productivity systems

::: {.card-actions}
[Live Demo](#){.project-link}
[GitHub](#){.project-link}
:::
:::
:::
:::
